session_note: S50 — autonomous batch run approved by user. Standard-tier batch (4 priorities): P1 vite/vitest CVE bump (minimal — vite ^6.4.2 + vitest ^2.1.0) + P2 main.ts hypertrophy refactor (4 extractions: physicsLoop / hostHandlers / clientHandlers / godlyOrchestration) + P3 Sym E score occlusion polish + P4 author new e2e tests for Sym I + Sym F. Council deliberated, PRIME-AUDIT pass complete. User explicit go.
council_battle_ledger: 5 rows. C1 ADOPT vite ^6.4.2 + vitest ^2.1.0 (Claude+Gemini converge over Grok vite 7). C2 ADOPT 4 extractions inc godlyOrchestration. C3 ADOPT NetSession state holder pattern (option a) for closure state. C4 ADOPT static dot x bump (210→260) + qHintText 240→290. C5 ADOPT Gemini env-override __TEST_WIN_SCORE__ via page.addInitScript for Sym I e2e.
prime_audit: 2 deltas. Δ1 NetSession reference identity — handlers MUST read session.transport per-invocation not per-creation to avoid stale captures on reconnect. Δ2 __TEST_WIN_SCORE__ env-override must be scoped to specific describe block via Playwright fixture isolation to prevent spurious WIN in unrelated tests.

priorities.label: S50 P0 — State discovery + Council deliberation
priorities.check_method: Phase A.0 empirical state probes: npm audit (4 moderate CVEs confirmed in vite/vitest chain), wc -l src/main.ts (1221 LOC confirmed hypertrophy), Read e2e/smoke.spec.ts (only Sym A/C/D/E describes — Rule 21 DELTA found: no fixme for Sym F/I, rescoped P4 from flip-fixme to author-new), Read territory.ts (Sym F mechanic confirmed), npm test (783/783 baseline GREEN, 44 test files). Council synthesis via Agent — 3-way deliberation, Battle Ledger 5 rows, PRIME-AUDIT 2 deltas.

priorities.label: S50 P1 — vite/vitest CVE bump
priorities.check_method: npm audit: 4 moderate CVEs → 0 vulnerabilities (esbuild GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 + vite GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9 + vite-node + vitest). npm test: 783/783 GREEN unchanged (44 test files). tsc -b --noEmit: clean. vite 6.4.2 build: SUCCESS, bundle 494.75 KB (within 500 KB charter, 5.25 KB headroom, +0.30 KB delta vs S49). Initial naive bump (vite ^6.4.2 + vitest ^2.1.9) went 4→5 moderate CVEs due to nested vite 5.x inside vitest 2.1.9 (vitest 2 explicitly depends on vite ^5.0.0). Revised to vitest ^3.2.4 (depends on vite ^5||^6||^7-0 → npm hoists to single vite 6.4.2 install). 2-major-jump for vitest, 1-major for vite. Council R1 had recommended minimal bump — execution found this missed the nested-dep CVE; revised in-flight per Rule 20 PRIME-AUDIT iteration.

priorities.label: S50 P2 — main.ts hypertrophy refactor
priorities.check_method: 4 extractions per Council Battle Ledger C2. (1) src/physics/physicsLoop.ts (146 LOC): stepPhysics + enforceFreeSparkCap + freeSparkArray + PHYSICS_DT/SUBSTEP_DT constants — mechanical, module-level already. (2) src/state/godlyOrchestration.ts (204 LOC): runGodlyMatcher + startCinematicIfNeeded + mutable state holder GodlyOrchestrationState — closure state migrated, deps passed as ctx per PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 per-invocation freshness. (3) src/net/session.ts (76 LOC): NetSession type holder + makeNetSession + teardownNet — Council Battle Ledger C3 ADOPT NetSession state holder pattern. (4) src/net/hostHandlers.ts (87 LOC) + src/net/clientHandlers.ts (95 LOC): factory functions createHostStartHandler / createBeginMatchHandler / createJoinAttemptHandler with deps object; late-bound onLobbyError thunk pattern avoids LobbyScreen circular-init. main.ts: 1221 → 888 LOC (-333 LOC, -27%). Council target ≤860 (within 28-LOC variance). Bundle: 494.75 → 496.13 KB (+1.38 KB module boundary overhead, within 500 KB charter — 3.87 KB headroom). vitest 783/783 GREEN. tsc -b --noEmit: clean. PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 verified: ctx rebuilt per-frame in main.ts:725-734 so session.netTransport reads are fresh on reconnect.

priorities.label: S50 P3 — Sym E score occlusion polish
priorities.check_method: Per Council Battle Ledger C4 ADOPT static dot bump over dynamic getBounds. src/render/ui.ts changes: (1) drawPlayerCharges helper — chargeDots base x: 210 → 260 (50px additional headroom over the 'RED  XX / 50' text which ends ~x=132 at 12-char monospace 16, 9.6px/char). (2) constructor qHintText position: x=240 → x=290 (clears new dot range max x=272+4=276 with 14px breathing gap). User-deferred 3 sessions running (S47/S48/S49 boot snapshots cited this issue). tsc -b --noEmit: clean. vitest 783/783 GREEN. No HUD behavior change.

priorities.label: S50 P4 — Author new e2e tests for Sym I + Sym F
priorities.check_method: Per Council Battle Ledger C5 ADOPT Gemini env-override path. Rule 21 DELTA caught at boot: spec had no Sym F/I fixme to flip — rescoped to author-new. src/constants.ts: PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE seam reads window.__TEST_WIN_SCORE__ at module-load (browser only; Node returns null→50 default). Playwright's page.addInitScript runs BEFORE bundled scripts so the seam fires before constants.ts evaluates. e2e/smoke.spec.ts: 2 new describes appended. (1) Sym F: joiner places 3 BLUE prims clustered ≤60px (all bond → complexity ≈4.6 → R≈80px), host attempts RED place AT cluster center, assert RED count unchanged (silent block at placePrimitive.ts host-auth gate). (2) Sym I: __TEST_WIN_SCORE__=3 scoped to BOTH contexts of THIS test via context.addInitScript (PRIME-AUDIT Δ2 mitigation — Playwright contexts isolated, no leak to A/C/D/E/F). Host places 3 anchors (200px apart, non-bonding, SCORE_ANCHOR=1 each), asserts host WIN + joiner WIN within 10s (via ENDGAME envelope). tsc -b --noEmit: clean. npm test: 783/783 GREEN unchanged. npm run build: success, bundle 496.13 → 496.28 KB (+0.15 KB const-seam, 3.72 KB headroom under 500 KB charter).
